description: Qwen-Image + HMFemme LoRA — candid-style realistic female photography
_comment: LoRA by burnerbaby (HearmemanAI), trained for realistic candid female photography on Qwen/Qwen-Image.
_comment_model: Base model: Qwen/Qwen-Image (QwenImagePipeline via DiffusionPipeline). LoRA was trained for this architecture.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD: prompts should start with 'HMFemme, an amateur photo taken from a smartphone camera'.
_comment_prompting: Use very descriptive prompts. Include lighting, pose, clothing, setting, camera angle for best results.
_comment_cfg: Qwen-Image uses true_cfg_scale (not guidance_scale). 4.0 is the recommended default.
_comment_steps: 50 steps recommended (Qwen-Image is not a distilled model). Author recommends pairing with Qwen Breasts LoRA.
_comment_size: 1328x1328 is the native 1:1 resolution. 1664x928 (16:9) and 928x1664 (9:16) also supported.
trigger_word: HMFemme, an amateur photo taken from a smartphone camera
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB VRAM. Qwen-Image is a large model (~20B params), offload strongly recommended.
